heading: Policies entitled to protection and lapse of policies
label: 3974 Policies entitled to protection and lapse of policies

children.heading: Determination
children.label: a Determination
children.text: The Secretary of Veterans Affairs shall determine whether a policy is entitled to protection under this subchapter and shall notify the insured and the insurer of that determination.

children.heading: Lapse protection
children.label: b Lapse protection
children.text: A policy that the Secretary determines is entitled to protection under this subchapter shall not lapse or otherwise terminate or be forfeited for the nonpayment of a premium, or interest or indebtedness on a premium, after the date on which the application for protection is received by the Secretary.

children.heading: Time application
children.label: c Time application
children.text: The protection provided by this subchapter applies during the insured’s period of military service and for a period of two years thereafter.
